Title: MY Shopeepay - One Time Payment
Content:
Last Update : Dec 30, 2025

MO PIC : Nora Atika

Xendit Stakeholders

Department

PIC

PIC Role

Partnership

Musa Sharuddin

Partnership PIC for Shopeepay

Partner PIC

Name

Email

Dee Lun Kok

deelun.kok@shopee.com

Eligibility

Entity Type

Eligible

Local Domestic MY Entity Sdn Bhd / Bhd

✅

Local Domestic MY Entity Sole Prop

✅

Local Domestic MY Entity Association

✅

Local Domestic MY Entity LLP / Partnership

✅

Foreign Entity

✅

Local / Foreign Individual

❌


Merchant Requirements

Category

Requirements

ShopeePay Prohibited Merchant Categories

  • Prohibited = cannot be onboarded

LIST OF PROHIBITED MERCHANTS:

  • Firearms / weapons / Ammunition

● Drugs, drug paraphernalia and drug test circumvention aids

● Fireworks and hazardous materials

● Miracle Cures

● Currency and FOREX

● Pornography, adult content and sexually oriented materials

● Escort services and sexually oriented services

● Counterfeit and replica goods

● Items or downloads infringe or violate copyright, trademark, right of publicity or privacy or any other proprietary right under the laws of any jurisdiction

● Pyramid or Ponzi scheme, matrix program and other "get rich quick" schemes

● Telemarketing

● Time sharing

● Gold bar

● Investment scheme

● File sharing services

● Items promote hatred, racism, religious persecution or contain offensive content.

● Items encouraging illegal activity

● Human remains and body parts

● Unlicensed Multi-level marketing

● Stolen goods including digital and virtual goods

● Items that are considered obscene

● Associated with purchases of annuities or lottery contracts, lay-away systems, off-shore banking or transactions to finance or refinance debts funded by a credit card

● Payment aggregator

● Associated with the sale of traveller’s checks or money orders

● Check cashing businesses

● Provide certain credit repair or debt settlement services, credit transactions or insurance activities.

● Unlicensed gambling, gaming and/or any other activity with an entry fee and a prize

SLA

Entity Origin

SLA

Local Domestic MY Merchants

Instant

Foreign Merchants

1 WD

Onboarding Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

Channel Activation

1

Merchants must submit a request to apply for Shopeepay one-time payment flow via their own dashboard.

Merchant

2

For Foreign merchants, still require MO to help activate manually after MO receives the notification request in #mo-request


2

For MY Local merchants, once merchant click “activate Shopeepay” from their merchant dashboard, Shopeepay will automatically activated for them

Merchant

3

However, when a (local) merchant encounters an error while activating ShopeePay via the Merchant Dashboard, the Sales, AM, or CS teams will request manual activation through the Zendesk workflow in #mo-request.

Consequently, you may see cases for local MY merchants appearing in the #mo-request channel rather than following the standard automated path.

Sales/AM/CS

MO Process Merchant’s Request

4

MO activates channel via Channel Activation Retool

  • Retool Guide

  • Use Shopeepay ID generator to generate required IDs

MO

Activation Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

1.

MO activates channel via Channel Activation Retool

MO

2.

Enter merchant’s BID and choose “MY Payex PLT”.

3.

Choose ‘Ewallet” for Payment Method.

4.

Select “SHOPEEPAY One Time payment” for channel.

5.

Fill the form.

  • Use Shopeepay ID generator to generate required IDs:

    • Request ID

    • Merchant Ext ID

    • Store Ext ID

  • Copy and paste the value in retool.

6.

You may refer here for the MCC table:

  • MCC Table

For other merchant category codes, can refer to merchant standard manual by Visa.

7.

Fill “Point Of Initiation” with 18 and “Withdrawal Option” with 3.

These are specific values that we must fill according to the SPP documentation, otherwise it would not work.

8.

Click next.

9.

Click Activate.

You should see success message and the payment method should be activated now on merchant’s end

Rejection Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

1.

When a merchant fails to meet the ShopeePay (One-Time Payment) onboarding criteria, the MO agent is responsible for notifying the merchant directly.

MO

2.

This is a manual "self-serve" process. The MO agent must send a manual email update to the merchant informing them of the rejection result.

3.

All rejection notifications must be sent using the official Merchant Operations email: merchantops@xendit.co.

  • Retool Guide
  • Use Shopeepay ID generator to generate required IDs

Activation Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

1.

MO activates channel via Channel Activation Retool

MO

2.

Enter merchant’s BID and choose “MY Payex PLT”.

2.

Choose ‘Ewallet” for Payment Method.

3.

Select “SHOPEEPAY One Time payment” for channel.

3.

Fill the form.

  • Use Shopeepay ID generator to generate required IDs:
    • Request ID
    • Merchant Ext ID
    • Store Ext ID
  • Copy and paste the value in retool.

4.

You may refer here for the MCC table:

  • MCC Table

For other merchant category codes, can refer to merchant standard manual by Visa.

5.

Fill “Point Of Initiation” with 18 and “Withdrawal Option” with 3.

These are specific values that we must fill according to the SPP documentation, otherwise it would not work.

6.

Click next.

7.

Click Activate.

You should see success message and the payment method should be activated now on merchant’s end

Tokenized

[SOP] MY Shopeepay (Tokenized)

Last Update : Dec 30, 2025

MO PIC : Nora Atika

Context

Shopeepay Tokeinized also known as “Account linking”,“Auto Debit via Shopeepay”, ‘Subscription via Shopeepay” that allows recurring payments via shopeepay

Xendit Stakeholders

Department

PIC

PIC Role

Partnership

Musa Sharuddin

Partnership PIC for Shopeepay

Partner PIC

Name

Email

Dee Lun Kok

deelun.kok@shopee.com

Eligibility

Entity Type

Eligible

Local Domestic MY Entity Sdn Bhd / Bhd

✅

Local Domestic MY Entity Sole Prop

❌

Local Domestic MY Entity Association

❌

Local Domestic MY Entity LLP / Partnership

✅

Foreign Entity

❌

Local / Foreign Individual

❌


Merchant Requirements

Category

Requirements

Legal Entity Eligibility

  • Merchant must be a SSM registered:
    • Berhad
    • Sdn Bhd
    • Partnership

Risk & Industry Classification (MCC)

  • Must be Low-to-Medium Risk MCC Categories
    • e.g. Healthcare, Education, Digital Products

Compliance & Background Screening

  • SPP will run a background check on the merchants based on the supporting documents required.

Required Documentation

Merchants are expected to provide below required documents during the submission for Shopeepay assessment:

  • SSM Certification / Certificate of Incorporation - will be used for background check by Shopeepay
  • Latest Financial Statement / 1 month full Latest Bank Statement with transactions record
  • Merchant's Account Linking Use case (e.g. business objective and user journey)

SLA

No

Submission

SLA

1

Xendit Submission to Shopeepay once documents completed

1 WD

2

Shopeepay risk review / resubmission

7-14 WD

3

Shopeepay management approval

3 WD

4

Shopeepay process credential

7 WD

Total SLA

± 21-30 WD

Onboarding Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

Channel Activation

1

Merchant submit request to apply for Shopeepay tokenized payment via their own dashboard.

Merchant

2.

Once merchant click “activate Shopeepay Tokenized” from merchant dashboard, the request will be reflected in #mo-request

Merchant

3.

MO will request the required documents from merchant through self serve email and agent can monitor response in #ca-email-notification slack channel

  • Account linking use case (user journey);
  • website requirement from column X,Y,Z,AA in Account Linking Justification.

MO

4.

Once the merchant has replied with the supporting documents and MO has reviewed the documents to ensure it meets the requirement, MO will proceed to fill up section A, B,C,D & E and upload the required doc in section E column W in the Account Linking Justification sheet.

MO

MO Process Merchant’s Request

4

MO to Fill in [Tokenized] Xendit Onboarding):

Basic Information (column A to C)

  1. Use Shopeepay ID generator to generate required IDs or if their SPP One Time Payment already active, retrieve from Retool > Payment settings
  2. Business Information (column E to W)


Unless there is special MDR arrangement, to leave MDR section blank for default rate

MO

5.

MO is required to download excel Shopeepay Merchant Onboarding List and submit the documents to Shopeepay via WhatsApp group.

6.

Await result from Shopeepay through WAG

  • If approved - credentials will be provided and use it to fill column AJ,AK,AL,AM of Shopeepay Merchant Onboarding List
  • If declined - SPP PIC will also inform MO within the same channel (WAG)

7.

MO to take note of the credentials that will be provided by SPP in WAG as it will be used during the activation process.

8.

MO will inform merchant that Tokenised flow is activated via initial thread request via Slack

Activation Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

1.

MO activates channel via Channel Activation Retool

MO

2.

Enter merchant’s BID and choose “MY Payex PLT”.

2.

Choose ‘Ewallet” for Payment Method.

3.

Select “SHOPEEPAY Tokenized Payment (Auto Debit)” for channel.

3.

Fill the form

  • Fill Request ID with any value (ex: 00000). This field is actually not used in the Tokenized payment activation process, only required on this form level.
  • Make sure Merchant Ext ID and Store Ext ID are the ones that we sent to Shopeepay during the onboarding approval process. (Refer to column B & C )
  • Fill Point Of Initiation with 18 and Withdrawal Option with 3. These fields are actually not used in the Tokenized payment activation process, only required on this form level.
  • Fill the rest accordingly

6.

Click next.

7.

Click Activate.

You should see success message and the payment method should be activated now on merchant’s end

Rejection Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

1.

When a merchant fails to meet the ShopeePay (One-Time Payment) onboarding criteria, MO agent is responsible for notifying the merchant directly.

MO

2.

This is a manual "self-serve" process. The MO agent must send a manual email update to the merchant informing them of the rejection result.

3.

All rejection notifications must be sent using the official Merchant Operations email: merchantops@xendit.co.

Merchant Requirements

Category

Requirements

Legal Entity Eligibility

  • Merchant must be a SSM registered:
    • Berhad
    • Sdn Bhd
    • Partnership

Risk & Industry Classification (MCC)

  • Must be Low-to-Medium Risk MCC Categories
    • e.g. Healthcare, Education, Digital Products

Compliance & Background Screening

  • SPP will run a background check on the merchants based on the supporting documents required.

Required Documentation

Merchants are expected to provide below required documents during the submission for Shopeepay assessment:

  • SSM Certification / Certificate of Incorporation - will be used for background check by Shopeepay
  • Latest Financial Statement / 1 month full Latest Bank Statement with transactions record
  • Merchant's Account Linking Use case (e.g. business objective and user journey)

Onboarding Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

Channel Activation

1

Merchant submit request to apply for Shopeepay tokenized payment via their own dashboard.

Merchant

2.

Once merchant click “activate Shopeepay Tokenized” from merchant dashboard, the request will be reflected in #mo-request

Merchant

3.

MO will request the required documents from merchant through self serve email and agent can monitor response in #ca-email-notification slack channel

  • Account linking use case (user journey);
  • website requirement from column X,Y,Z,AA in Account Linking Justification.

MO

4.

Once the merchant has replied with the supporting documents and MO has reviewed the documents to ensure it meets the requirement, MO will proceed to fill up section A, B,C,D & E and upload the required doc in section E column W in the Account Linking Justification sheet.

MO

MO Process Merchant’s Request

4

MO to Fill in [Tokenized] Xendit Onboarding):

Basic Information (column A to C)

  1. Use Shopeepay ID generator to generate required IDs or if their SPP One Time Payment already active, retrieve from Retool > Payment settings
  2. Business Information (column E to W)


Unless there is special MDR arrangement, to leave MDR section blank for default rate

MO

5.

MO is required to download excel Shopeepay Merchant Onboarding List and submit the documents to Shopeepay via WhatsApp group.

6.

Await result from Shopeepay through WAG

  • If approved - credentials will be provided and use it to fill column AJ,AK,AL,AM of Shopeepay Merchant Onboarding List
  • If declined - SPP PIC will also inform MO within the same channel (WAG)

7.

MO to take note of the credentials that will be provided by SPP in WAG as it will be used during the activation process.

8.

MO will inform merchant that Tokenised flow is activated via initial thread request via Slack

Activation Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

1.

MO activates channel via Channel Activation Retool

MO

2.

Enter merchant’s BID and choose “MY Payex PLT”.

2.

Choose ‘Ewallet” for Payment Method.

3.

Select “SHOPEEPAY Tokenized Payment (Auto Debit)” for channel.

3.

Fill the form

  • Fill Request ID with any value (ex: 00000). This field is actually not used in the Tokenized payment activation process, only required on this form level.
  • Make sure Merchant Ext ID and Store Ext ID are the ones that we sent to Shopeepay during the onboarding approval process. (Refer to column B & C )
  • Fill Point Of Initiation with 18 and Withdrawal Option with 3. These fields are actually not used in the Tokenized payment activation process, only required on this form level.
  • Fill the rest accordingly

6.

Click next.

7.

Click Activate.

You should see success message and the payment method should be activated now on merchant’s end

Rejection Flow

Category

No

Steps

Owner / PIC

1.

When a merchant fails to meet the ShopeePay (One-Time Payment) onboarding criteria, MO agent is responsible for notifying the merchant directly.

MO

2.

This is a manual "self-serve" process. The MO agent must send a manual email update to the merchant informing them of the rejection result.

3.

All rejection notifications must be sent using the official Merchant Operations email: merchantops@xendit.co.
